summary: EXP-452 addresses SC cluster inflation via two patches: P1 generalizes the Evaluation Guide counting-methodology paragraph from tidal-only to all four observed SC clusters (tidal + Schumann + cosmological + H(r)); P2 populates detail_group on 11 cluster-member WINs in data/wins.json. WIN-061 is reassigned from magnetic-broad to Schumann (rationale in cluster_assignment_rationale). No verdicts change.
